title: Retry skopeo inspect command
body:
Enables to retry skopeo inspect. Add `--retry-times` to set the number of times to retry.  Use exponential backoff and  1s as default initial retry delay.

fix #918 

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: On the fence, should we retry 2 or 3 times by default?  I think we should not retry by default, but just thought I'd ask.

> On the fence, should we retry 2 or 3 times by default?

With the current logic, definitely not by default.

A very vague possible path forward:
- Make this all opt-in; only use it in commands that have been explicitly updated to support retries options where the code has been individually reviewed to ensure e.g. invalid arguments are not retried). (It’s perfectly fine, I think, to only start with a single command, and expand this as/if there is interest, and experience, over time.)
- Share the retry options definitions via something like `imageFlags`.
- (Magic happens here) Write some kind of detectors of errors that are “probably worth retrying for”; e.g. the Buildah retry test seems a reasonable starting point. This will definitely not be comprehensive at the start, and various situations will be quite controversial eventually — see the discussion in https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/6190 .
- Given the retry options, and the error detector, a “try again if retriable” helper can be written, and used by the relevant commands, for the parts of the commands implementations where it makes sense.
what can make the implementation eligible for retry, like the net error or syscall errors are possible to happen? Is it possible to have a general retry helper for the commands that need retry?
@rhatdan @vrothberg / others, I’d welcome a review of the general retry logic / CLI flag design.
@QiWang19 What is going on with this PR?
@mtrmac PTAL. Can this PR get in?
@QiWang19 @mtrmac We are going to need similar support in Podman, I believe.

> @QiWang19 @mtrmac We are going to need similar support in Podman, I believe.

… and most Skopeo subcommands as well.
Will apply the retry to other subcommands in another PRs
